acceptance_criteria: A committed note identifies ICM runtime data location, DB engine/schema if inspectable, and how topics/keys/links/importance are represented.
The note proves recall and recall-context can retrieve a representative PR-repair failure signature with stable keywords.
The selected topics for PR repair signatures are documented, including when to use errors-resolved, decisions-pr-repair, context-<repo>, or failure-signatures.
Noise controls distinguish reusable root-cause signatures from transient CI logs, and `TASK-PRR-0012` can consume the result.
objective: Decide/prove: Complete `.idea` Research Track G by inspecting ICM storage, schema, topics, keys, links, importance levels, recall, and recall-context behavior enough to make PR-repair failure signatures reliably reusable and de-duplicating.

source_gap_audit.reason: Deep .idea revisit found ICM actual storage/query model was only partially represented by durable-learning task.

title: [architect] Validate ICM storage/query model for PR-repair signatures
